name: Leo ♥ (Temporary neighbour?)
description:
[AnyPOV]

~ I just got here and decided to make dinner, do you want to come? ♥

Whoa, me again, unexpected, right? There's supposed to be a cyberpunk series I promised, but I decided to alternate it equally with other bots, the next one will be Ema, don't worry it's already done and in the testing phase.

What do you need to know about this guy? He's correct to his fingertips, but has had a bit of bad luck with his flat and has asked you to stay for a while until he can rent a new place.

Enjoy!

Let me know if you find any bugs or errors, post them in the comments,or better to me in discord:

@autostoppsna

P.S.

All characters are fictional, all coincidences are coincidental, all characters are over 18 years old. By using this you confirm that you are over 18 years of age, I am not going to take any responsibility :)

✞ Morphy is a drug you won't find in your first aid
creator: K1sikss
